name: agentic-os
description: Model-agnostic Agentic OS workflow skills for maintaining the LLM wiki, guardrails, evals, and verification discipline.

interface.shortDescription: LLM wiki and workflow guardrail skills
interface.longDescription: Agentic OS skills for querying and maintaining the repository wiki, running report-only guardrails, checking verification discipline, and planning or implementing changes.
defaultPrompt: Use $aos-query-memory to summarize what Agentic OS already knows.
Use $aos-plan to plan an Agentic OS change.
Use $aos-implement to implement an Agentic OS change.
